nasb.text: “You have heard that it was said, ‘You shall love your neighbor and hate your enemy.’

esv.text: “You have heard that it was said,     ‘You shall love your neighbor and hate your enemy.’

cnv.text: “你們聽過有這樣的吩咐：‘當愛你的鄰舍，恨你的仇敵。’

ccb.text: “你们听过这样的话，‘要爱邻居，恨仇敌。’

csbs.text: “你们听过这吩咐：‘要爱你的邻人      ，恨你的敌人    。’
